title: agrostis dura
intro: Agrostis dura is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is commonly found in various parts of the world. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Agrostis dura include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Agrostis dura can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and coughs.
